use msdb
			Select TOP 1 r.status,s.host_name,r.start_time
			FROM sys.dm_exec_requests r 
			INNER JOIN sys.dm_exec_sessions s ON s.session_id = r.session_id
			WHERE 
				r.command = 'BACKUP DATABASE' and 
				r.database_id = DB_ID(@OrgDbName) and 
				s.host_name is not null and
				s.host_name like '%CrmAsyncService'
There is already a full backup in progress for DB {0}. Host: {1}, Status {2}, Start Time: {3}

BEGIN
							SET NOCOUNT ON
							SET XACT_ABORT ON

							DECLARE @RecordCountToDelete int = 1
							DECLARE @ActivationsToDelete TABLE
							(
								WorkflowId UNIQUEIDENTIFIER
							)

							WHILE @RecordCountToDelete > 0
								BEGIN
									BEGIN tran
										INSERT @ActivationsToDelete
											SELECT TOP 5000 WorkflowId 
											FROM WorkflowBase
											WHERE
												Type = 2
											AND (Category = 0 OR Category = 2 OR Category = 3)
Could not find the plugin assembly or type to execute.
Could not find the plugin assembly or type to execute.

SELECT ObjectTypeCode, COUNT(PrincipalObjectAccessId) AS ReadShareCount
											  FROM PrincipalObjectAccess POA 
											  WHERE ((POA.AccessRightsMask | POA.InheritedAccessRightsMask) &1) = 1 
											  GROUP BY ObjectTypeCode

declare @d datetime
set @d = DATEADD(n, @Minutes, GETUTCDATE())
exec sp_trace_create @TraceId output, 0, @TraceFile, @MaxFileSize, @d
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM FieldSecurityProfile WHERE FieldSecurityProfileId <> '572329C1-A042-4E22-BE47-367C6374EA45'

SELECT AVG(Result.usercount), MAX(Result.usercount) FROM (SELECT COUNT(P.AttributeId) AS usercount FROM PrincipalObjectAttributeAccess AS P 
FULL OUTER JOIN (SELECT AttributeId FROM AttributeView WHERE IsSecured = 1) AS A 
ON A.AttributeId = P.AttributeId GROUP BY (A.AttributeId)) AS Result
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM SolutionComponent WHERE ComponentType = @ComponentType AND SolutionId = @SolutionId

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM MetadataSchema.Entity AS e INNER JOIN SolutionComponent AS sol ON sol.ObjectId = e.EntityId WHERE sol.ComponentType = @ComponentType AND sol.SolutionId = @SolutionId AND e.IsCustomEntity = 1

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM AttributeView AS A INNER JOIN SolutionComponent AS sol ON sol.ObjectId = A.EntityId  WHERE A.IsCustomField=1 AND sol.ComponentType = @ComponentType AND sol.SolutionId = @SolutionId

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM RelationshipView AS r INNER JOIN SolutionComponent AS sol ON sol.ObjectId = r.ReferencingEntityId WHERE r.IsCustomRelationship=1 AND sol.ComponentType = @ComponentType AND sol.SolutionId = @SolutionId
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM WebResource as web INNER JOIN SolutionComponent as sol ON sol.ObjectId = web.WebResourceId where sol.ComponentType = @ComponentType AND sol.SolutionId = @SolutionId
select sum(SuccessCount+FailureCount) from bulkdeleteoperationbase group by bulkdeleteoperationbase.BulkDeleteOperationId
select sum(SuccessCount) from bulkdeleteoperationbase group by bulkdeleteoperationbase.BulkDeleteOperationId
select sum(FailureCount) from bulkdeleteoperationbase group by bulkdeleteoperationbase.BulkDeleteOperationId
select distinct OrderedQuerySetXml from bulkdeleteoperationbase where bulkdeleteoperationbase.OrderedQuerySetXml is not null and bulkdeleteoperationbase.BulkDeleteOperationId is not null

declare @tempTable table
(
  TableName nvarchar(128),
  NumberOfRows bigint,
  ReservedSpace nvarchar(20),
  DataSpace nvarchar(20),
  IndexSpace nvarchar(20),
  UnusedSpace nvarchar(20)
)

declare @returnTable table
(
  ObjectTypeCode int,
  ObjectCount bigint,
  PrimaryTableSize int default 0,
  SecondaryTableSize int default 0
)

declare @TableName sysname

declare TableCursor cursor FORWARD_ONLY READ_ONLY for
select t.name from sys.tables t where t.type = 'U'
and (t.n
select FormXml from SystemForm where Type = 0
select FormXml from UserForm where Type = 0
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM Email (NOLOCK) WHERE DirectionCode = 0 AND CreatedOn >= DATEADD(DAY, -1, GETUTCDATE())
SELECT DeliveryPriorityCode, COUNT(1) FROM Email (NOLOCK) WHERE DirectionCode = 1 AND CreatedOn >= DATEADD(DAY, -1, GETUTCDATE()) GROUP BY DeliveryPriorityCode
SELECT IncomingCredentialRetrieval, COUNT(1) FROM EmailServerProfile (NOLOCK) WHERE StateCode = 0 GROUP BY IncomingCredentialRetrieval
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM EmailServerProfile (NOLOCK) WHERE StateCode = 0 And IncomingAuthenticationProtocol = 2
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM EmailServerProfile (NOLOCK) WHERE StateCode = 0 AND ServerType = 0 AND IncomingUseImpersonation = 1

SELECT OutgoingUseImpersonation, OutgoingAutoGrantDelegateAccess, COUNT(1) FROM EmailServerProfile (NOLOCK) WHERE StateCode = 0 AND ServerType = 0 GROUP BY OutgoingUseImpersonation, OutgoingAutoGrantDelegateAccess
SELECT IncomingEmailDeliveryMethod, COUNT(1) FROM Mailbox (NOLOCK) WHERE StateCode = 0 AND RegardingObjectTypeCode = 8 GROUP BY IncomingEmailDeliveryMethod
SELECT COUNT(1), CorrelationMethod FROM Email (NOLOCK) WHERE DirectionCode = 0 AND StateCode = 1 AND StatusCode = 4 AND  CreatedOn >= DATEADD(DAY, -1, GETUTCDATE()) GROUP BY CorrelationMethod
select cast( sum(numberreads + numberwrites) as int) from fn_virtualfilestats(db_id(), null)

SELECT CONVERT(FLOAT,SUM (a.Result)) / CONVERT(FLOAT,SUM(b.Result)) 
				 FROM StatisticsData a 
				 INNER JOIN StatisticsData b 
				 ON a.EndTime = b.EndTime 
				 WHERE a.StatisticTypeId=@StatisticTypeCompletionTimeId 
				 AND b.StatisticTypeId=@StatisticTypeCompletedCountId 
				 AND a.OrganizationId=@OrganizationId 
				 AND b.OrganizationId=@OrganizationId 
				 AND a.EndTime > DATEADD(hour,@HoursBack,getUtcDate())

SELECT COUNT(CrmUserId) 
					 FROM SystemUserOrganizations 
					 WHERE OrganizationId = @OrganizationId 
					AND LastAccessTime >  DATEADD(minute,@MinutesInterval,getUtcDate())
